subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath attained unto the Most Great Horizon and been honored by the glance of favor of the Lord of Names. Thou hadst expressed thy sorrow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوبت بمنظر اکبر فائز و بلحاظ عنایت مالک اسما مشرف اظهار حزن نموده بودی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @high station of the true believer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
